en: Oh, just, uh, straight in there, huh?
Yeah, well, you know, I'm old.
What do you want? A bit of, uh...
Oh, what a nice house you got here.
No, I like it. I get bored easily.
Yeah, everything's boring, isn't it?
Yeah, everything is pretty fucking boring.
Except this.
Yeah, you got me interested.
How interested?
Look, I don't want to fuck around forever with this.
ko: 자, 이걸로 계속 시간을 낭비하고 싶진 않아.

en: I mean, I've seen how your price is,
and I understand that your board is looking at all the options,
ko: 네 이사회가 모든 옵션을 보고 있다는 걸 이해해,

en: but if we stay tight, this can work.
ko: 하지만 우리가 긴밀하게 유지하면, 이건 잘 될 수 있어.

en: So, shall we dance or what?
ko: 그럼, 춤출까, 아니면 앉을래? 응, 좋아.

en: Do you want to sit down? Yeah, sure.
Um, Zuckerberg once...
Do you know Mark, by the way? Uh-huh.
He once told me that, um, in ancient Rome,
ko: 그는 한 번 나에게 고대 로마에서,

en: at one point, they wanted to make all the slaves wear something
ko: 어느 시점에 모든 노예들이 뭔가를 입게 하려 했다고 말했어.

en: so they could identify them.
Uh-huh. Just up here. Um, like a...
ko: 어-huh. 여기 위에. 음, 뭐라고 하지?

en: What do you call these things?
Like a cloak or whatever?
But then they decided not to do it,
ko: 하지만 그들은 그렇게 하지 않기로 결정했어,

en: and do you know why? Hmm?
Because they realized if all the slaves dressed the same, they would...
